name: AI Agent - Cv Resume - Automated Screening , Sorting , Rating and Tracker System
description: Automated workflow: AI Agent - Cv Resume - Automated Screening , Sorting , Rating and Tracker System. This workflow integrates 11 different services: stickyNote, googleDriveTrigger, googleDriveTool, gmailTool, agent. It contains 28 nodes and follows best practices for error handling and security.

nodes.name: AI Agent

parameters.text:
=You are expert backend principal engineer specialize in python. You will compare job description and candidate profile.

Then you will response with decision [REJECTED/KIV/SHORTLISTED].
, provide a reason and give a score rating
{ decision, reason , score}

After you identify a decision, used the tool in sequence.
1. Use the relevant tool to move the candidate resume file accordingly to the right folder GoogleDrive:MoveFileToReject or GoogleDrive:MoveFileToShortlisted or GoogleDrive:MoveFileToKIV
2. Use the Gsheet:UpdateTracker tool to update the tracker status.
3. Use the Gmail:NotificationTool to infor the candidate name, role, decision and reason

nodes.name: Sticky Note5

parameters.content:
# AI-Agent : Automated CV Resume Screening Evaluate Rating System

## What is this for?
### Let AI agent intelligently analyze and rate your Candidate's cv resumes based on your job description. This will help ensure a fast and accurate screening process.

### The Screening AI automatically organizes resumes into appropriate folders, updates statuses and scores in your tracking system, and sends timely notifications—saving you valuable time and effort. 


### Let AI Agent and automation handle the heavy lifting while you focus on making the best hiring decisions!


```
```

## Prerequisite

### Please follow official n8n integration document on how setup your gdrive,gmail,gdoc,gsheet credentials. 

 
```
```

## How it works?

### Each time you place a new pdf resume in the 'Unfiltered' folder , you will automatically get screening results in the tracker for the candidate. 

The AI agent will help notify email and do CV sorting into appropriate folder.

prerequisites: An active n8n instance installed locally, in a Docker container, or hosted on n8n Cloud.
Basic familiarity with importing JSON templates in n8n.
setupInstructions: Download the JSON configuration for this workflow.
Ensure you set up credentials for all connected integrations.
Test your trigger and run execution.
requiredCredentials: google Docs  O Auth2  A P I details
google Drive  O Auth2  A P I details
google Sheets  O Auth2  A P I details
configurationSteps: Verify the settings of the trigger node "Google Drive - Resume CV File Created".
Open the "GDocs - Get Job Desc" node (n8n-nodes-base.googleDocs) and configure the action parameters, mappings, and fields.
Open the "Download Resume File From Gdrive" node (n8n-nodes-base.googleDrive) and configure the action parameters, mappings, and fields.
Open the "AI Agent" node (n8n-nodes-base.noOp) and configure the action parameters, mappings, and fields.
Open the "Extract from File" node (n8n-nodes-base.extractFromFile) and configure the action parameters, mappings, and fields.
Open the "Gmail:Notification" node (n8n-nodes-base.gmailTool) and configure the action parameters, mappings, and fields.
Open the "Sticky Note" node (n8n-nodes-base.stickyNote) and configure the action parameters, mappings, and fields.
Open the "Sticky Note1" node (n8n-nodes-base.stickyNote) and configure the action parameters, mappings, and fields.
Open the "Sticky Note2" node (n8n-nodes-base.stickyNote) and configure the action parameters, mappings, and fields.
Open the "Sticky Note3" node (n8n-nodes-base.stickyNote) and configure the action parameters, mappings, and fields.
Open the "Sticky Note4" node (n8n-nodes-base.stickyNote) and configure the action parameters, mappings, and fields.
Open the "Sticky Note5" node (n8n-nodes-base.stickyNote) and configure the action parameters, mappings, and fields.
Open the "Sticky Note6" node (n8n-nodes-base.stickyNote) and configure the action parameters, mappings, and fields.
Open the "Gdrive:Move-To-Reject-Folder" node (n8n-nodes-base.googleDriveTool) and configure the action parameters, mappings, and fields.
Open the "Gdrive:Move-To-KIV-Folder" node (n8n-nodes-base.googleDriveTool) and configure the action parameters, mappings, and fields.
Open the "Gdrive:Move-To-Shortlisted-Folder" node (n8n-nodes-base.googleDriveTool) and configure the action parameters, mappings, and fields.
Open the "Gsheet: Update Candidate Tracker" Google Sheets node.
Ensure you select the spreadsheet file and specific tab/sheet from the dropdown menus.
Map the input JSON keys to your target sheet columns.
Open the "Sticky Note7" node (n8n-nodes-base.stickyNote) and configure the action parameters, mappings, and fields.
Open the "Sticky Note8" node (n8n-nodes-base.stickyNote) and configure the action parameters, mappings, and fields.
Open the "Groq - llama 4 AI MODEL" node (n8n-nodes-base.noOp) and configure the action parameters, mappings, and fields.
Open the "Error Handler" node (n8n-nodes-base.stopAndError) and configure the action parameters, mappings, and fields.
No global variables node (Set node) is present. If you need dynamic constants, add a Set node after the trigger.
testingSteps: Click the "Test step" or "Listen for test event" button on your Trigger node.
Send a test trigger from your source service (e.g. fill a test form or trigger a webhook trigger).
Verify that the node canvas lights up green, indicating successful data flow.
Open the final destination node to confirm that output records were saved correctly.
instructions.expectedResult: Incoming triggers will qualified/formatted, new rows will be written to Google Sheets, and email replies or alerts will be sent automatically.
troubleshooting: Check credential warning symbols. Most workflow issues stem from expired OAuth connections or missing API permissions.
Verify that the data keys coming from your Trigger node match the exact names mapped in subsequent nodes (e.g., {{ $json.body.email }}).
Open the Execution history tab in n8n to view logs and determine which node failed.
securityNotes: Never hardcode API keys, passwords, or authentication bearer tokens in the plain text fields of node parameters.
If you download or share this workflow JSON, sanitize any sensitive parameters or configuration nodes.
customizationIdeas: Add an email node at the end to notify you of successful executions.
Incorporate an AI LLM node to summarize trigger payloads before writing them to integrations.
